title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-17
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily garden check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating health checks and metrics for all the apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of application metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md files.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory reflects the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: The robot companion acting as a gardener, checking on plants in a greenhouse. Polly the bee hovering nearby with a clipboard, recording metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head inspecting glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, chunky sprites, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head inspecting glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard.
